'''vashacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabadine|sabadine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabadine|sabadine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vashacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væshæchæth|væshæchæth]] || [[word:væshæchæj|væshæchæj]] || [[word:væshæchæsh|væshæchæsh]] || [[word:væshæchæ|væshæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashashachath|vashashachath]] || [[word:vashashachaj|vashashachaj]] || [[word:vashashachash|vashashachash]] || [[word:vashashacha|vashashacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashachath|vashachath]] || [[word:vashachaj|vashachaj]] || [[word:vashachash|vashachash]] || [[word:vashacha|vashacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashafchath|vashafchath]] || [[word:vashafchaj|vashafchaj]] || [[word:vashafchash|vashafchash]] || [[word:vashafchaf|vashafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vashachatha|vashachatha]] || [[word:vashachaja|vashachaja]] || [[word:vashachasha|vashachasha]] || [[word:vashachaka|vashachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vashachath|vashachath]] || [[word:vashachaj|vashachaj]] || [[word:vashachash|vashachash]] || [[word:vashacha|vashacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vashachathal|vashachathal]] || [[word:vashachajal|vashachajal]] || [[word:vashachashal|vashachashal]] || [[word:vashachakal|vashachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vashachathatha|vashachathatha]] || [[word:vashachajaja|vashachajaja]] || [[word:vashachashasha|vashachashasha]] || [[word:vashachaka|vashachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vashachathan|vashachathan]] || [[word:vashachajan|vashachajan]] || [[word:vashachashan|vashachashan]] || [[word:vashachakan|vashachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vashachathaoro|vashachathaoro]] || [[word:vashachajaoro|vashachajaoro]] || [[word:vashachashaoro|vashachashaoro]] || [[word:vashachakaoro|vashachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
